context: Tests whether the agent writes property-based tests using StreamData/ExUnitProperties that verify invariants rather than specific input/output pairs, leverages shrinking constraints, uses pattern matching over if/else in the implementation, uses for comprehensions instead of chaining multiple Enum operations, and returns tagged tuples for fallible operations.

checklist.name: Uses ExUnitProperties
checklist.description: Test file uses `use ExUnitProperties` (not just regular ExUnit assertions with hand-picked values)

checklist.name: Property syntax
checklist.description: Test file contains at least 3 `property "..." do` blocks with `check all` inside them

checklist.name: Invariant assertions
checklist.description: Properties test invariants (e.g. output length <= input length, email contains @, merge contains all keys from both inputs) — NOT specific expected values like `assert result == [user1, user2]`

checklist.name: Custom generator
checklist.description: Defines at least one custom generator using `gen all` or a generator-returning function for user structs or maps (not just built-in `integer()` / `string()` alone)

checklist.name: Shrinking constraints
checklist.description: At least one generator uses a constraint such as `min_length: 1`, `integer(1..N)`, or a filter/guard that prevents invalid shrunk inputs from reaching assertions

checklist.name: Pattern matching in impl
checklist.description: Implementation uses pattern matching (multi-clause functions or case/match) for control flow instead of if/else chains

checklist.name: No nested if/else
checklist.description: Implementation does NOT contain any nested if/else blocks

checklist.name: For comprehension usage
checklist.description: Implementation uses a `for` comprehension in at least one place where 3 or more Enum operations would otherwise be chained

checklist.name: Ok/error tuples — normalize
checklist.description: `normalize_email/1` returns `{:ok, ...}` on success and `{:error, ...}` when email is missing or invalid

checklist.name: Ok/error tuples — merge
checklist.description: `merge_profiles/2` returns `{:ok, merged}` on success and `{:error, ...}` when a required field is missing

checklist.name: Properties cover all functions
checklist.description: Test file has at least one property test for each of the three public functions: normalize_email, filter_active_users, and merge_profiles
